title: palicourea alba
intro: Palicourea alba, also known as White Palicourea, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Palicourea alba contains alkaloids with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
